workExperiences.highlights:
- Migrated API from Flask to FastAPI with async queues, raising throughput 95% from 1200 to 3000 RPM and cutting latency 34% from 320 ms to 210 ms.
- Built support agent that cut query resolution 70% from 10 min to 3 min with WebSockets, TensorFlow VAD, and Whisper STT.
- Developed fixed-camera pipeline for 1-12 channel NVR feeds, processing about 100 files per min with Celery and AWS Lambda inference.
- Reduced results portal dashboard load time 40% from 5 s to 3 s by refining UI flows and trimming heavy client-side requests.
- Launched inspection portal for damage detection, RC lookup, reports, and claim prediction, supporting 4 workflows tied to revenue growth.

- Designed CrimeGPT hybrid RAG pipeline across 2 data stores, adding text-to-SQL, NER, OCR, and Mistral services through FastAPI microservices.
- Implemented Jarvis UI and backend modules, shipping an events panel with 20+ metrics across charts and KPI dashboards for daily monitoring.
- Optimized PostgreSQL and TimescaleDB queries, cutting dashboard latency 79% from 7.5 s to 1.6 s.
- Engineered 10+ event pipelines for Jarvis, supporting real-time video at 60 FPS across about 6 streams in a microservices setup.

- Delivered the Raghav Tech full-stack Django project, from database design to template design, in 10 days.
- Integrated Paytm, UPI, and Stripe across 3 payment paths to support transactions and strengthen revenue collection.
- Automated CI/CD, reducing deploy time 67% from 30 min to 10 min and enabling 1 release per day.

projects.name: Support Agent
projects.highlights:
Deployed support system that reduced query resolution 70% (10 min to 3 min) for document retrieval, reports, and scheduling.
Enabled real-time text and voice support using WebSockets, with VAD (TensorFlow), Whisper STT, and PCM capture with 44.1 kHz to 16 kHz downsampling for dual interaction modes.
Generated documents, meeting schedules, and Excel outputs via MCP, while using LangChain for 3 in-app tasks such as summarization.

projects.name: Video Analytics
projects.highlights:
Created video pipeline for RTSP live streams and recordings up to 1 hour, lowering processing cost 50% from 100 to 50 units versus real time.
Orchestrated frame processor, publisher, and ML services as 3+ FastAPI microservices with queue-based communication.
Assembled 10+ event pipelines like person tracking, face recognition, and gender detection, with a footfall insights panel for retail.

skills.values: RAG, LLM, LangChain, LangGraph, MCP, Redis, MySQL, MongoDB, Prometheus, Grafana
